access_denied.requirement.chance: Try again! You have a %s chance
access_denied.requirement.free.slots: Have %s free slots in your inventory
gui.access_denied.builder_advancements.t: Which advancements the player needs to have obtained to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_block_bounties: What blocks and how many of them the player has to mine to access the dimension.
How many blocks does a player need to break to access the dimension.
How many blocks does a player need to place to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_chance.title: Chance
gui.access_denied.builder_chance.tooltip: Additional chance (in %) for the player to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_date.title: Date
gui.access_denied.builder_date.tooltip_1: Date in UTC timezone of when the dimension is unlocked.
gui.access_denied.builder_date.tooltip_2: Day / Month / Year / Hour / Minute / Second
gui.access_denied.builder_deaths.title: Deaths
gui.access_denied.builder_deaths.tooltip: How many times does a player need to die to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_dimension.tool: This is the registry name of the dimension you want to setup Requirements for.
gui.access_denied.builder_disabled.title: Disabled
gui.access_denied.builder_disabled.toolt: Should the dimension be completely unaccessible?
gui.access_denied.builder_effects.title: Effects
gui.access_denied.builder_effects.toolti: Which effects does a player need to have to access the dimension.
Input 1=Effect registry name, Input 2=Level of the effect
gui.access_denied.builder_free_slots.too: How many inventory slots the player must have free to access the dimension.
Includes slotbar, main inventory, offhand, armor slots and Curios/Trinkets.
gui.access_denied.builder_ftb_quests.too: IDs of the FTB Quests the player needs to have completed to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_health.title: Health
gui.access_denied.builder_health.tooltip: How much health does a player need to have to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_itemskey.title: Items Key
gui.access_denied.builder_itemskey.toolt: Which items does a player need to have in their inventory to access the dimension.
Input=Item registry name, Checkbox=Consume item when passing through portal.
gui.access_denied.builder_jumps.title: Jumps
gui.access_denied.builder_jumps.tooltip: How many times does a player need to jump to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_location_biome: Registry name of the biome the player needs to be in to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_location_dimen: Registry name of the dimension the player needs to be in to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_mob_bounties.t: What mobs and how many of them the player has to kill to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_mob_kills.tool: How many mobs does a player need to kill to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_player_kills.t: How many other players does one need to kill to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_playtime.title: Playtime
gui.access_denied.builder_playtime.toolt: How many seconds does a player need to have played to access the dimension.
What should happen to the portal when access is denied?
gui.access_denied.builder_times_fished.t: How many times does a player need to fish to access the dimension.
gui.access_denied.builder_xp_level.title: Experience Level
gui.access_denied.builder_xp_level.toolt: What experience level does a player need to have to access the dimension.
